title: gab #1354
definition:
1) convex surface, back
    1a) back (of man)
    1b) mound (for illicit worship)
    1c) boss (convex projection of shield)
    1d) bulwarks, breastworks (of arguments - fig.)
    1e) brow, eyebrow
    1f) rim (of wheel)
